name: ALUMIS INC.
business: Alumis is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company developing TYK2 inhibitors (envu and A-005) for immune-mediated diseases, and lonigutamab for Thyroid Eye Disease. The company has no approved products and no product revenue.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company with an initial focus on developing our two Tyrosine Kinase 2 ( TYK2 ) inhibitors: envudeucitinib ( envu ), formerly known as ESK-001, a second-generation inhibitor that we are developing to maximize target inhibition and optimize tolerability, and A-005, a central nervous system ( CNS ) penetrant allosteric TYK2 inhibitor.
In connection with the ACELYRIN Merger, we acquired lonigutamab, a subcutaneously delivered, monoclonal antibody targeting IGF-1R for the potential treatment of Thyroid Eye Disease ( TED ).

catalysts.event: NDA submission for envu in PsO
catalysts.sentence: we plan to submit a New Drug Application ( NDA ) for envu in PsO to the FDA in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results for Phase 3 ONWARD1 and ONWARD2 trials
catalysts.sentence: we reported positive topline results in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline results for Phase 2 SLE trial
catalysts.sentence: we expect to report topline results in the third quarter of 2026.
